user.title: MCP Proxy
user.description: This integration is managed by the MCP Proxy add-on. It proxies MCP requests via a webhook for remote access.

oauth_restart_required.title: Restart Home Assistant to enable OAuth

confirm.title: Restart Home Assistant?
confirm.description:
OAuth was enabled in the MCP Proxy add-on, but the new OAuth-enforcing integration code has not been loaded into Home Assistant yet. Submitting this form will restart Home Assistant so the new code takes effect; the webhook URL will then enforce OAuth.

Click **Submit** to restart now.
